skill.name: gate-mcp-installer
skill.description: One-click installer and configurator for Gate MCP (mcporter) in OpenClaw. Use when the user wants to (1) Install mcporter CLI tool, (2) Configure Gate MCP server connection, (3) Verify Gate MCP setup, or (4) Troubleshoot Gate MCP connectivity issues.
skill.summary: One-click installer for Gate MCP (mcporter) CLI tool that connects Claude to Gate.io cryptocurrency exchange for market data queries.
skill.author: gate

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate installer skill for Gate.io cryptocurrency exchange MCP tool. All static findings are false positives: markdown files contain documentation with code examples (not executable code), the shell script executes standard npm install commands, and network URLs point to the official Gate MCP endpoint. The skill requires external commands and network access to install the mcporter CLI and connect to Gate MCP server, which is expected installer behavior.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Execution in Installer Script
low_findings.description: The install-gate-mcp.sh script executes npm commands to install mcporter CLI. This is standard installer behavior for a legitimate tool.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The shell script executes 'npm i -g mcporter' and 'mcporter config add' commands. These are standard npm install commands with hardcoded arguments, not user input. No command injection risk exists.

low_findings.title: Network Access to Gate MCP Endpoint
low_findings.description: The skill connects to api.gatemcp.ai for MCP server communication. This is the official Gate cryptocurrency exchange endpoint.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network access is to the official Gate MCP server endpoint (api.gatemcp.ai). This is a legitimate cryptocurrency exchange service, not a suspicious endpoint.

content.value_statement: This skill automates installing and configuring the Gate MCP tool, enabling Claude to query Gate.io cryptocurrency exchange data like prices, arbitrage opportunities, and funding rates through natural language.
actual_capabilities: Install mcporter CLI tool globally via npm
Configure Gate MCP server endpoint automatically
Verify connectivity and list available Gate MCP tools
Troubleshoot common installation and connection issues
limitations: Requires Node.js and npm to be installed on the system
Requires internet connection to download mcporter and connect to Gate MCP server
Does not provide API keys - uses Gate MCP public endpoint without authentication
Cannot execute trades or access private account data

use_cases.title: First-Time Gate MCP Setup
use_cases.description: New users can install Gate MCP with a single command or natural language request. The skill handles npm installation, configuration, and verification.
use_cases.target_user: Users new to Gate AI skills who want to access cryptocurrency market data

use_cases.title: Verify Gate MCP Installation
use_cases.description: Check if Gate MCP is properly installed and connected. Reports status and available tools.
use_cases.target_user: Users troubleshooting other Gate skills or verifying their setup

use_cases.title: Troubleshoot Connectivity Issues
use_cases.description: Diagnose and fix common problems like missing mcporter, incorrect configuration, or connection timeouts.
use_cases.target_user: Users experiencing issues with Gate MCP connectivity

prompt_templates.title: Install Gate MCP
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me install Gate MCP for Claude. I want to use it to query cryptocurrency prices on Gate.io.

prompt_templates.title: Verify Installation
prompt_templates.prompt: Check if Gate MCP is installed correctly. Is it connected and ready to use?

prompt_templates.title: Troubleshoot Connection
prompt_templates.prompt: Gate MCP is not working. I get a connection timeout error. Can you help me troubleshoot?

prompt_templates.title: Update mcporter
prompt_templates.prompt: Update mcporter to the latest version and verify Gate MCP is still working.

output: [Step 1/4] Checking npm installation... ✓ npm is installed (10.0.0)
[Step 2/4] Installing mcporter CLI... ✓ mcporter installed successfully
[Step 3/4] Configuring Gate MCP server... ✓ Gate MCP configured
[Step 4/4] Verifying Gate MCP connectivity... ✓ Gate MCP is working!
Available tools: check_price, analyze_token, find_arbitrage, funding_rate...
Gate MCP is ready to use!

output_examples.input: Check BTC price using Gate MCP

best_practices: Ensure Node.js is installed before requesting Gate MCP installation
Verify the installation succeeded by asking for available tools
Check internet connectivity if installation or connection fails
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill to execute trades - it only provides market data
Do not expect private account data access - the public MCP endpoint is used
Do not skip troubleshooting steps if connection fails - verify each requirement

faq.question: What is Gate MCP?
faq.answer: Gate MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that connects Claude to Gate.io cryptocurrency exchange, enabling natural language queries for market data.

faq.question: Does this skill give me access to my Gate.io trading account?
faq.answer: No. This skill uses the public Gate MCP endpoint which provides market data only. It does not access private account balances or execute trades.

faq.question: What do I need before installing Gate MCP?
faq.answer: You need Node.js and npm installed on your system, and an internet connection to download mcporter and connect to the Gate MCP server.

faq.question: What can I query with Gate MCP?
faq.answer: You can query cryptocurrency prices, analyze tokens, find arbitrage opportunities, check funding rates, and more market data from Gate.io.

faq.question: Why is my connection timing out?
faq.answer: Check your internet connection and ensure you can reach api.gatemcp.ai. Some networks may block the connection. Try again or use a different network.

faq.question: How do I update mcporter to the latest version?
faq.answer: Simply ask to update mcporter or reinstall Gate MCP. The skill will download and install the latest version from npm.
